privileged_info_summary: The task operates on the real experimental human ubiquitin NMR solution structure (PDB ID: 1D3Z) downloaded directly from the RCSB Protein Data Bank. The PDB file correctly contains exactly 10 conformer models, and its extreme C-terminal flexibility (residues 72-76) is correctly expected by the verifier logic. The required output file paths and thresholds (30000 bytes for figure size, 8 lines for report) match the export and verifier scripts perfectly.
